headline: Amazon Launches $37 Billion Bond Sale as AI Spending Surges
summary: This article first appeared on GuruFocus.  Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) has returned to the debt market with unusual scale, launching a massive bond sale that may signal renewed momentum in corporate borrowing after volatility linked to sharp swings in oil prices slowed issuance.  The company priced $37 billion of dollar-denominated bonds across 11 tranches, while also planning to sell 10 billion in euro bonds.
